text.title: BA Planning Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules every application of BA Planning enforces.

rule.statement: Approach declared (plan_driven | change_driven | hybrid) with rationale citing context constraints.
rule.rationale: Default 'agile' without rationale fits poorly when context demands plan-driven.

rule.statement: Stakeholders typed with role + authority (Approve/Consult/Inform) + channel + cares-about. ≥1 Approve authority per primary outcome.
rule.rationale: Untyped stakeholder lists hide authority gaps.

rule.statement: Deliverables list enumerates each artefact with format + due-by date + named owner.
Governance section names: approver, change process, escalation path — all three. Missing any line fails the plan.
rule.rationale: Partial governance produces conflict at first scope dispute.

rule.statement: Plan carries version_tag (semver) + sponsor signoff with name + ISO date.
